data.body:
[Schale's Happy Valentine Patrol & Kosaka Wakamo's Silence and Feast Celebration Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a gift for the new event!
Please check your mailbox for 10-Recruitment Ticketx1!
(Available until 9/13/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))
